question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.key, T1.identifier FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_1c9a44_in_attr_a5101e JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.key = T3.attr_68ebfd_by_attr_2a3f11_key GROUP BY T1.key HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;
raw_response: SELECT T1.key, T1.identifier FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_1c9a44_in_attr_a5101e JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.key = T3.attr_68ebfd_by_attr_2a3f11_key GROUP BY T1.key HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;
